name: mutsuki-test-io
description: Process I/O test harness tools for Mutsuki.

interface.shortDescription: Run test processes and capture I/O for Mutsuki.
interface.longDescription: Adds local MCP tools for running commands, driving interactive processes, and sending JSONL requests while keeping Mutsuki runtime core domain-neutral.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Mutsuki Test I/O to run backend smoke tests.
